raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Self-affirmation of conditional willingness, modeling evidence-weighted override of fear-based avoidance",
  "implicit_claims": ["Evidence can indicate net helpfulness of an action", "Fear is not decisive grounds for refusal when such evidence exists", "The speaker possesses or can access the relevant evidence"],
  "coherence_assessment": "Coherent; cleanly subordinates affective response to an epistemic criterion without denying the affect",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "User can reliably gather and interpret evidence of likely benefit and the statement functions as a prompt for adaptive exposure rather than self-licensing",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "Evidence is vague, self-serving, or systematically biased toward underestimating risk, or the statement is recited without corresponding behavioral change"
}
